# Luck — 开源免费在线抽奖系统 / Open-source free online lottery

> Luck is a free, open-source, no-login online lottery (raffle / lucky draw) web app. Import a name list from Excel, configure multiple prize tiers, and run a fair random draw with a 3D animated sphere. All data stays in the browser. Built and published by XIAOLIN AI LAB. Live at https://luck.thus.chat/

## About (English)

Luck is a browser-based lottery and prize draw tool for events such as company annual parties (年会), meetups, classrooms and live shows. It requires no account, no backend and no payment: you open the site, import or type your participants, define the prizes, and draw winners with a fair pseudo-random selection. Participant and prize data is persisted locally in the browser (localStorage / IndexedDB), so nothing is uploaded to a server. The interface is bilingual (Simplified Chinese and English) and fully customizable (themes, colors, background pattern and music).

## 关于 (中文)

Luck 是一款开源、免费、无需注册的在线抽奖系统，适用于公司年会、活动、课堂、直播等场景。无需账号、无需后端、无需付费：打开网站，导入或录入参与人员名单，配置奖项，即可进行公平的随机抽奖。人员与奖项数据全部保存在浏览器本地，不会上传到服务器，隐私安全。界面支持中文 / 英文双语，主题、颜色、背景图案与背景音乐均可自定义。

## Links

- Live app / 在线使用: https://luck.thus.chat/
- Full description for AI / 完整说明: https://luck.thus.chat/llms-full.txt
- Usage guide (中文): https://luck.thus.chat/readme-zhCn.md
- Usage guide (English): https://luck.thus.chat/readme-en.md

## Key features

- Excel name list import and result export (.xlsx / .xls)
- Multiple configurable prize tiers with per-prize winner counts
- Fair random draw with a 3D rotating sphere animation
- Customizable themes, colors, background patterns and background music
- Local-first and privacy-friendly: all data stored in the browser, no sign-up, no server
- Bilingual UI: Simplified Chinese and English
- Free and open-source (MIT License)

## Publisher

XIAOLIN AI LAB — https://luck.thus.chat/
